info.name: Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Management Configuration Manager REST API (AdminService)
info.description:
REST API for managing Configuration Manager resources including collections, deployments, applications, and device queries. The administration service is based on the OData v4 protocol and supports both WMI and versioned OData routes. Class names are case-sensitive.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Configuration Manager Support

item.name: wmi
SMS_Device
Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Management List devices via WMI route

query.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include.

request.description: Retrieve a collection of devices managed by Configuration Manager using the WMI route. Supports OData query options for filtering and selecting.

response.name: Successful response returning a collection of devices.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include.

query.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include.

response.name: Forbidden. The user account must be an administrative user in Configuration Manager.
